title: Custom World Generation
description: Customize your terrain, biome and structure generation
body:
# Abstract

This mod is separated from [Ocean World](https://modrinth.com/mod/ocean-world). You can customize terrain generation, biome generation and structure generation with this mod.

# How to use

Install this mod. **Server side** is required while client side is optional (no effect whether install in client side or not).

Edit `custom_worldgen-config.json` in "config" folder in your game directory at server side (for single player, this is located at ".minecraft/config"; for multiple player, this is located in "<server directory>/config").

Following the guide in `custom_worldgen-config-readme.md`. You can also use [Ocean World Config Generator](https://viola-siemens.github.io/pages/tools/oceanworld-config.html) to help you do this.

# Examples/Presets

[Here's some presets of config file](https://github.com/Viola-Siemens/Custom-World-Generation/tree/main/config-examples).

# Compatibility

Before 1.20, if you want to play this mod with TerraBlender together, you should install it with [Ocean Blender](https://modrinth.com/mod/ocean-blender).

After 1.20, ocean blender is merged into this mod so you don't have to install any other mod else.

I have to say that all biome mods **except BOP** can work with this mod together. I tried to contact with the author of BOP, but he seems [not to want to fix this compatibility issue](https://github.com/Glitchfiend/BiomesOPlenty/issues/2024).
